title: min_bars floor ignores min_dwell: FX H4 cells write empty parquet + vacuous dossiers as status=built
why: build_all_regimes default_min_bars(freq)=burn_in+SAMPLE_SUFFICIENT_BARS_MIN(200) under-counts for H4. EUR/GBP/USDJPY H4 (7786 bars) clear the 7760 gate but label_regimes returns 0 labeled bars because the H4 vol-pct burn-in (~7680) + min_dwell (40*6=240) exceeds available history. build_one_cell then writes an empty regimes parquet + 4 vacuous dossiers and reports status=built with sufficient=[]. Downstream sufficient=[] is honest so not dangerous, but built is misleading and empty artifacts get committed.
value_rationale: Prevents misleading built status and committed empty artifacts; tightens multi-asset roll-up honesty.
scope: Raise floor to burn_in + min_dwell + margin, OR add a built_empty status when n_labeled_bars==0 and skip writing artifacts
Add a regression test for the [burn_in+200, burn_in+min_dwell] H4 band
recommendation: built_empty status (option b) is most honest and cheap to add to build_one_cell.

history.reason: feat(phase5): build multi-asset regimes + dossiers for all registry assets (piece #3)
docs(spec): B0066 skip cells that clear min_bars but yield 0 labeled regimes
fix(scripts): B0066 skip cells that clear min_bars but yield 0 labeled regimes
chore(regimes): B0066 cleanup â€” remove empty FX-H4 artifacts; refresh manifests

build_one_cell now returns skipped_no_labeled_bars (writes nothing) when label_regimes yields 0 labeled bars; removed the committed empty EUR/GBP/USDJPY H4 artifacts. Test + cleanup committed. 2026-05-28.
chore(backlog): quiesce cross-session reconciliation + B0079 prereq + B0068 done
